REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Continued To May-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared by zoom for Terrence Woo (executor).

The court noted that the petition is now moot. Mr. Feder requested a 45 to 60-day continuance stating that they are having difficulty selling one security, that there is an issue with the decedent's surviving spouse and that he will be filing a petition for preliminary distribution. The Petition for Approval of Second Report of Status of Administration is continued to May 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Feder sit to have his petition filed by May 14, 2024. The court advised Mr. Feder to respond to the probate examiner's notes.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared via zoom for Terrance Woo (executor).

Mr. Feder stated that he would need some more time to file the Petition to approve report of administration and have it filed before January 23, 2024. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to January 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared via zoom for Terrence Woo (petitioner).

Mr. Feder stated that additional assets are in the sister's estate and will need a little more time to file the petition. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to November 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by November 07, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Continued To Sep-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Bruce Feder appearing via zoom Terrance Woo (petitioner).

Mr. Feder requested a continuance and is very close to finishing the petition. Status on hearing close of estate is continued to September 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Petition to be filed before September 12, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared by zoom for and with Terrence Woo.

The court noted that Mae Woo is a nominated executor, and that she hasn't filed a declination, but she got notice and her counsel got notice. Mr. Feder confirmed that they were given notice, and stated that Ms. Woo attended a hearing in June in the estate of Audrey Woo and that Mae Woo has been well aware of this. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 15, 1992 is admitted to probate. Terrence Woo is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 25, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
